releaseNotes: Shadow Chat persona selector (6 personalities), first-launch LLM download prompt, CPU-only inference, WebGPU removed, Shadow memory persistence fix, website 3D and text interaction overhaul.

notes: Shadow Chat persona selector — 6 voices (Mirror, Mentor, Rival, Commander, Confidant, Strategist)
First-launch LLM download prompt with progress bar
CPU-only inference via node-llama-cpp — WebGPU ModelLoader removed
Shadow Chat memory now persists to localStorage and injects into LLM system prompt
Website overhaul: 3D fix, text interactions, cursor trail, matrix overlay, particle connections
EXE download URL corrected — points to NEXUS-Self-Evolution releases
Model: Qwen2.5-2B-Instruct (Q4_K_M, ~1.5 GB) from HuggingFace
Effort-mirror tone: Sync → Log. Manager copy reframed around effort, not points.
3-of-7 streak window. Rest tokens now spendable from the Consistency tracker.
SAGE · INT, TITAN · STR, CHRONOS · AGI, MANAGER · WIL domain-stat badges.
Story Archive tab — read narrative chapters for XP and NC rewards.
Mission Debrief tab — daily Manager message at end of day.
Changelog panel — see what changed in each version.
Manual update button in main menu.
Logout clears all data.
Splash boot animation.
3-section HabitLab.
Multi-agent orchestrator wiring.
Initial public release of NEXUS Self-Evolution.
6 stats, 24 components, multi-agent AI orchestration.
